nasb.text: On the next day the large crowd who had come to the feast, when they heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem,

esv.text: The next day the large crowd that had come to the feast heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 第二天，有一大群上來過節的人，聽見耶穌要來耶路撒冷，

ccb.text: 第二天，很多上来过节的人听见耶稣快到耶路撒冷了，

csbs.text: 第二天，一大群上来过节的人听说耶稣要来到耶路撒冷，
